title: Tile and Stone Adhesive
intro: Our tile and stone adhesives are advanced bonding solutions designed to securely fix tiles and stones to walls and floors. They provide strong, long-lasting adhesion, reduce cracking or lifting, and ensure a smooth, durable, and visually appealing finish for residential, commercial, and industrial projects.

products.name: Akemi Stone Cleaner
products.description: Akemi Stone Cleaner is a tile and stone adhesive from Ethios that delivers strong bonding and prevents cracking or lifting for durable installations. Contact our technical team for the data sheet and coverage details.
